brain.commentary: The current portfolio is heavily weighted toward high‑beta tech stocks and crypto assets, pushing overall volatility above market norms. While a few long positions (AAPL, GOOGL, SPY, QQQ, DIA) show positive alpha and reasonable conviction, many flat signals exhibit negative composites, negative alphas, and elevated beta/volatility, making them fragile. We therefore tilt modestly defensive, trimming conviction on the weaker and more volatile names and nudging up the stronger, lower‑beta long ideas. Fragile signals flagged: NVDA, TSLA, META, BTC/USD, ETH/USD, SOL/USD, LTC/USD.

counsellors.nvidia:
